title: The ONLY 6 Skills You Need to 10x Your Claude Projects
summary: Austin Marchese outlines six essential skills for maximizing Claude projects: web scraping, knowledge base ingestion, iterative system improvement, collaborative board advisors, internal focus group testing, and compound engineering. The skills are demonstrated through building a personal fitness trainer project using Claude Code, Claude Cowork, and Claude Projects.
